name: Babe's Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the whole wheat flour, toasted wheat germ, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, and nutmeg.
2. Set aside.
3. In another large bowl, combine the peeled and diced apples, granulated sugar, brown sugar, vegetable oil, chopped walnuts, beaten eggs, and vanilla extract.
4. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture.
5. Stir gently until well combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 2-inch deep baking pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool in the pan on a rack.
9. If desired, sprinkle with powdered sugar.
10. Cut into 12 bars.
